belier.intro: A sliver of new light appears in Leo tonight, only 1.8 percent illuminated, and it falls into your fifth house of joy and self-expression. Mercury retrograde still moves through your fourth house of home, keeping old domestic conversations unresolved, while Neptune retrograde continues its long dissolve through your own sign. The Cancer Sun deepens your third house, favoring small, honest words over grand declarations today.
belier.love: A playful spark returns to a relationship that has felt heavy under recent retrograde weather. Do not overthink it; this waxing crescent favors a simple gesture of warmth over a serious conversation.
belier.work: Creative projects benefit from a fresh, tentative start today. Plant the seed of an idea rather than expecting a finished result; the sliver Moon rewards beginnings, not completions.
belier.energy: Your fire returns in a small, bright flame rather than a blaze. Use it for one focused act of creativity or play rather than spreading it across a long list of tasks.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde in your first house keeps asking you to separate your true impulses from borrowed ones. A quiet moment alone today reveals which desire is genuinely yours.
belier.mantra: I let my joy begin again in small, honest sparks.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The new crescent Moon in Leo settles into your fourth house, illuminating home and inner foundations with a faint but growing light. Mercury retrograde sits in your own third house, so words about your roots or your family history may still tangle before they clarify. The Cancer Sun brightens your second house, keeping your sense of security tied closely to what you can actually hold and count today.
taureau.love: A tender moment at home carries more weight than anything said in public today. Let the Leo Moon's warmth soften a domestic routine that has felt merely functional.
taureau.work: Financial planning benefits from small, deliberate steps rather than one large decision. The waxing sliver favors starting a new budget or savings habit over finalizing anything big.
taureau.energy: Your earth steadies you even as Mercury's retrograde in your communication house asks for patience with misunderstandings. Ground yourself through simple physical tasks at home.
taureau.intuition: A feeling about your living situation or a family matter that has been forming quietly is worth trusting today, even if you cannot yet explain it in words.
taureau.mantra: I build my home one honest brick at a time.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The new Leo crescent falls into your third house of communication and immediate surroundings, its 1.8 percent light a quiet invitation to speak up gently rather than loudly. Mercury, your ruling planet, remains retrograde in your own sign, urging you to reread before you send and listen twice before you answer. The Cancer Sun continues through your first house, keeping your own needs close to the surface even as you focus outward.
gemeaux.love: A short, warm exchange means more than a long, complicated one today. Let the Leo Moon add a touch of playfulness to a conversation with someone close.
gemeaux.work: Local errands, short correspondence, and small logistical fixes go more smoothly than anything requiring a final decision. Save contracts and big commitments for when Mercury turns direct.
gemeaux.energy: Mental energy is quick but easily scattered today. Choose one conversation or task to give your full attention rather than juggling several at once.
gemeaux.intuition: A hunch about a sibling, neighbor, or everyday interaction deserves a second look. Mercury retrograde often returns old information in a new light.
gemeaux.mantra: I speak gently and listen twice as much.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun in your own sign at nearly 23 degrees gives you quiet emotional authority today, even as the new Leo Moon in your second house asks you to reconsider what truly makes you feel secure. Mercury retrograde continues through your twelfth house, stirring half-formed thoughts and old memories that surface without warning. Neptune retrograde in Aries keeps your tenth house of career slightly hazy, asking for patience rather than definitive moves.
cancer.love: Your emotional clarity today makes it easier to name what you need without demanding it. A partner is likely to respond well to simple, direct honesty rather than hints.
cancer.work: A small financial or resource-related decision benefits from being made slowly. The new Leo Moon favors quietly gathering information over publicly announcing a plan.
cancer.energy: Your emotional tides are calm today, supported by the Sun's presence in your sign. Use this steadiness to nourish yourself rather than to overextend for others.
cancer.intuition: Old dreams or half-remembered feelings surfacing from your twelfth house carry real information about an unresolved matter. Write them down before they fade.
cancer.mantra: I know what truly makes me feel safe.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The new Moon lands directly in your own sign today at 7 degrees Leo, a rare and potent seed moment for the year ahead of you. Mercury retrograde in your twelfth house keeps some of your intentions private for now, best held close rather than announced. The Cancer Sun in your twelfth house alongside it adds a layer of quiet reflection to what is otherwise a deeply personal new beginning.
lion.love: A private wish about a relationship, held rather than spoken, plants itself powerfully under this new Moon in your sign. Let your intention form fully before you share it.
lion.work: This is a genuine seed-planting day for your own path and image. Set a personal intention for the months ahead, but keep the details to yourself while Mercury remains retrograde.
lion.energy: Your vitality quietly renews itself today, like an ember catching before the flame shows. Rest supports this renewal as much as action does.
lion.intuition: With both Mercury and the Sun retrograde-adjacent in your twelfth house, your inner knowing speaks through feeling rather than words. Trust the pull you cannot yet explain.
lion.mantra: I plant my new beginning quietly and trust it to grow.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The new Leo Moon settles into your twelfth house of rest and hidden processing, its faint light barely visible yet quietly significant. Mercury, your ruling planet, moves retrograde through your eleventh house, complicating plans made with friends or groups. The Cancer Sun in your eleventh house adds warmth to your social world even as some of its threads remain tangled until the retrograde clears.
vierge.love: A quiet, private tenderness matters more today than any public display. If a relationship needs healing, solitude together may serve better than a big conversation.
vierge.work: Behind-the-scenes work, rest, and unfinished tasks deserve your attention more than new group ventures right now. Let Mercury's retrograde motion in your social house slow your plans without alarm.
vierge.energy: Your system asks for restoration today, not output. Give yourself permission to do less and notice how much clearer your mind becomes by evening.
vierge.intuition: Something surfacing from dreams or quiet moments alone carries a message about a friendship or group commitment. Do not dismiss it as random.
vierge.mantra: I rest fully and let clarity come to me.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The new Leo Moon brightens your eleventh house of friendship and future vision, a faint but hopeful light after recent lunar intensity. Mercury retrograde in your tenth house asks you to revisit a professional conversation rather than start a new one. The Cancer Sun in your tenth house alongside it keeps your public direction emotionally significant, not just practically so.
balance.love: A friend's perspective on your relationship carries useful weight today. Listen without rushing to defend your choices; there may be something worth hearing.
balance.work: A career matter that felt settled may reopen for discussion under Mercury's retrograde. Treat this as an opportunity to refine your direction, not a setback.
balance.energy: Your social energy is gently renewing itself today. Choose one meaningful connection over several superficial ones.
balance.intuition: Your sense of where your professional path is truly heading is quietly sharpening. Notice which ambitions still feel true and which have simply become habit.
balance.mantra: I welcome honest reflection about where I am headed.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The new Leo Moon rises in your tenth house of career and public standing, small in light but significant in placement. Mercury retrograde in your ninth house muddles travel plans, publishing, or educational pursuits, asking for a second look before moving forward. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house nonetheless keeps your search for meaning warm and emotionally alive.
scorpion.love: A conversation about long-term direction, including where a relationship is going, benefits from patience today. Let the new Moon plant an intention rather than force a conclusion.
scorpion.work: This is a genuine moment to set a quiet intention for your reputation and career path. Avoid finalizing travel or publishing plans until Mercury moves direct.
scorpion.energy: Your ambition finds a small, steady flame today rather than an urgent push. Channel it into planning rather than immediate execution.
scorpion.intuition: A recurring thought about your public direction or a belief you have long held deserves honest examination now. Trust what keeps resurfacing.
scorpion.mantra: I set my intention and let ambition build quietly.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The new Moon in fellow fire sign Leo lights up your ninth house of meaning, belief, and horizon, a small ember that speaks to your adventurous spirit. Mercury retrograde in your eighth house asks for care with shared resources or emotionally weighted conversations. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house deepens the emotional undertone of any financial or intimate matter today.
sagittaire.love: Emotional intimacy deepens today if you allow vulnerability rather than deflecting with humor or distance. A quiet, honest exchange serves you better than a grand gesture.
sagittaire.work: A shared financial matter, contract, or joint resource benefits from careful review rather than quick agreement while Mercury remains retrograde.
sagittaire.energy: Your fire burns thoughtfully today, more suited to reflection on a bigger question than to bold outward action.
sagittaire.intuition: A feeling about a shared arrangement or a close bond that has not added up deserves your attention. Trust the quiet doubt more than the reassurance.
sagittaire.mantra: I trust the meaning that quietly reveals itself.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The new Leo Moon settles into your eighth house of intimacy and shared resources, its faint light asking for depth rather than display. Mercury retrograde in your seventh house complicates partnership communication, favoring review over new agreements. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house keeps a significant relationship emotionally central to your day.
capricorne.love: A partner's needs come into sharper focus today, even if the conversation feels unfinished. Let Mercury's retrograde motion remind you that clarity often takes more than one exchange.
capricorne.work: Negotiations and contracts benefit from rereading the fine print rather than signing quickly. This is a moment to plant careful intentions, not close deals.
capricorne.energy: Your steady Capricorn discipline serves you well today in matters that require patience rather than speed.
capricorne.intuition: A quiet sense about a partner's true feelings or a shared financial matter is worth trusting, even without full evidence yet.
capricorne.mantra: I build trust patiently, one honest step at a time.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The new Leo Moon opposes your own sign from your seventh house, casting a small but pointed light on your closest partnerships. Pluto retrograde continues its slow work of transformation within you, while Mercury retrograde in your sixth house asks for patience with daily routines and health matters. The Cancer Sun in your sixth house keeps your body's needs emotionally present today.
verseau.love: A relationship benefits from a fresh, gentle intention today rather than a demand for immediate resolution. Let the new Moon plant a seed of renewed understanding.
verseau.work: Daily routines and health habits deserve a second look under Mercury's retrograde. Revise rather than abandon what has stopped working smoothly.
verseau.energy: Your body asks for rhythm and consistency today rather than intensity. Small, repeatable habits serve you better than ambitious overhauls.
verseau.intuition: Pluto's deep work within you continues to surface old patterns for release. Notice what pattern in a partnership you are quietly ready to let go of.
verseau.mantra: I renew my closest bonds with quiet, honest intention.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The new Leo Moon brightens your sixth house of daily rhythm and service, a small light asking you to begin a healthier routine rather than perfect one overnight. Neptune, your ruling planet, remains retrograde in Aries within your second house, continuing its slow clarification of your relationship with money and self-worth. Mercury retrograde in your fifth house asks for patience with creative or romantic plans.
poissons.love: A romantic matter that felt uncertain benefits from gentle patience rather than a bold declaration today. Let feelings clarify before you act on them.
poissons.work: A new health or work routine can be gently planted today, even if it will take weeks to fully take root. Do not expect instant results from the new Moon's small light.
poissons.energy: Your sensitive Piscean energy responds well to small, consistent rituals today rather than dramatic change. Begin modestly and let momentum build.
poissons.intuition: Neptune's retrograde continues to clarify what you truly value, separate from what merely looks secure. Trust the discomfort as part of the process.
poissons.mantra: I begin gently and trust small steps to grow.
poissons.author: Sibylle
